passiveAbilities.name: You Protect Me Like the Babe
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Dmg this character would suffer by -1 for each friendly Babeling within 6".

arcaneAbilities.name: Milkies
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target friendly character restores X Wds.
Target friendly character gains +1 energy. 
Catastrophe: The target suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Summon the Nursery
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a new Sprog in base contact with this character.
Place a new Pookie in base contact with this character.
Place a new Urchin in base contact with this character.
Catastrophe: This model and Babelings within 6" suffer 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Lullaby
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target model must discard half its energy rounding up, then it restores 2 Wds. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Nap Time!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, they lose 1 energy.
